package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerRuntimeConfigurationDebugBuildTagsInHotBinary() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_debug_build_tags_in_hot_binary"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag performance-sensitive binaries that keep debug/profiling build tags enabled by default."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
